raw_consumer_statement:
XXXX XXXX2025 made reservation to fly to XXXX and thought I was talking to XXXX but was speaking to XX/XX/XXXX who I apparently gave my Citi XXXX credit card information for {$6600.00}. My wife called XXXX to change reservation and made the same flight and was charged by XXXX also for same flight. So Citi is charging me XX/XX/XXXX for same flight. Tried to contact XXXX XXXX to cancel the reservation made with them. Unable to reach XXXX XXXX. Filed Fraud claim with Citi who said it was not fraud but scam so they couldn't help me. Therefore filed dispute with CitiXX/XX/XXXXand was given inoperable phone numbers both times for XXXX XXXX. Citi allegedly investigatedXX/XX/XXXX after I filed Police report and was told by Visa charge was to be paid and Citi was unable to provide me financial relief from Visa nor XX/XX/XXXX corporate name nor address, working phone numbers, email, nor website. Spoke to XXXX about possible XXXX info about XXXX XXXX. I was told by XXXX that if a XXXX party made a reservation on their airline they would have a transaction Number which they did not have any record of. Unexplainedly, XXXX XXXX provided exact same ticket number as XXXX to XXXX which is why XX/XX/XXXX says it was a legitimate charge and would not refund money. I have been paying interest on disputed amount. If this is happening to me then it is happening to many more Floridians. I was able to find out from Citi that XXXX of New Jersey apparently is where XXXX XXXX took the funds but XXXX is unreachable unless one has an account. 

Please help me get credit from Citi and hold them responsible for poor representation of me and XXXX for being part of this fraudulent transaction.
